quoteLast: , and closing at 12 P.M., thus remaining open only two or three hours. Other flowers, we may add, are so peculiarly delicate, as scarcely to bear the contact of the atmosphere.
title: The Mirror of Literature, Amusement, and Instruction. Volume 19, No. 549 (Supplementary number)
author: Various
